shortFormVideo.hook: Your company documents should be searchable without pasting sensitive files into public AI tools.
shortFormVideo.brief: 30-45 second vertical video: open with the risk of unmanaged document AI, show the safer local RAG checklist, then point viewers to the EB28 implementation guide.
beats: Name the problem: staff need fast answers from private documents
Show the guardrails: document scope, access rules, source citations, review path
